title: OpenAI
text: OpenAI is an artificial intelligence company. OpenAI was founded by Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever, Wojciech Zaremba, John Schulman, and Elon Musk in 2015. OpenAI develops ChatGPT and GPT models. Sam Altman is the CEO of OpenAI. OpenAI partnered with Microsoft. Microsoft invested in OpenAI. OpenAI is based in San Francisco.

title: Anthropic
text: Anthropic is an artificial intelligence safety company. Anthropic was founded by Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei in 2021. Dario Amodei formerly worked at OpenAI. Daniela Amodei formerly worked at OpenAI. Anthropic develops Claude. Amazon invested in Anthropic. Google invested in Anthropic. Anthropic is based in San Francisco.

title: DeepMind
text: DeepMind is an artificial intelligence research company. DeepMind was founded by Demis Hassabis, Shane Legg, and Mustafa Suleyman in 2010. Google acquired DeepMind in 2014. DeepMind develops AlphaGo and AlphaFold. Demis Hassabis is the CEO of DeepMind. DeepMind is based in London.

title: Google
text: Google is a technology company. Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin in 1998. Google acquired DeepMind. Google invested in Anthropic. Google employs Jeff Dean. Google develops Gemini. Google is based in Mountain View.

title: Microsoft
text: Microsoft is a technology company. Microsoft was founded by Bill Gates and Paul Allen in 1975. Microsoft invested in OpenAI. Microsoft partnered with OpenAI. Microsoft develops Azure AI. Microsoft is based in Redmond.

title: Meta
text: Meta is a technology company. Meta was founded by Mark Zuckerberg in 2004. Meta develops Llama. Meta acquired WhatsApp and Instagram. Yann LeCun works at Meta. Meta is based in Menlo Park.

title: xAI
text: xAI is an artificial intelligence company. xAI was founded by Elon Musk in 2023. Elon Musk also co-founded OpenAI. xAI develops Grok. xAI is based in the San Francisco Bay Area.

title: Inflection AI
text: Inflection AI is an artificial intelligence company. Inflection AI was founded by Mustafa Suleyman, Reid Hoffman, and Karen Simonyan in 2022. Mustafa Suleyman co-founded DeepMind. Inflection AI develops Pi. Microsoft hired several Inflection AI employees.

title: Cohere
text: Cohere is an artificial intelligence company. Cohere was founded by Aidan Gomez, Ivan Zhang, and Nick Frosst in 2019. Aidan Gomez formerly worked at Google. Nick Frosst formerly worked at Google. Cohere develops Command models. Cohere is based in Toronto.

title: Character AI
text: Character AI is an artificial intelligence company. Character AI was founded by Noam Shazeer and Daniel De Freitas in 2021. Noam Shazeer formerly worked at Google. Daniel De Freitas formerly worked at Google. Character AI develops conversational agents.

title: Perplexity AI
text: Perplexity AI is an artificial intelligence search company. Perplexity AI was founded by Aravind Srinivas, Denis Yarats, Johnny Ho, and Andy Konwinski in 2022. Aravind Srinivas formerly worked at OpenAI. Perplexity AI develops an AI answer engine.

title: Nvidia
text: Nvidia is a technology company. Nvidia was founded by Jensen Huang, Chris Malachowsky, and Curtis Priem in 1993. Nvidia develops GPUs. Nvidia supplies AI accelerators to OpenAI, Microsoft, Google, Meta, and Amazon.
